name: Horn of Valhalla, Brass
description: You can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to blow this horn. In response, warrior spirits from the plane of Ysgard appear in unoccupied spaces within 60 feet of you. Each spirit uses the {@creature Berserker|XMM} stat block and returns to Ysgard after 1 hour or when it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The spirits look like living, breathing warriors, and they have {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and {@condition Frightened|XPHB} conditions. Once you use th
